title: Introducing Props
description: Pass data from parent to child.

slides.title: Props = Properties 📦
Multiple Props

quizData.question: What are props in React?

options.text: Data that a component manages internally
Read‑only inputs passed from parent to child
Methods to update a component's state

quizData.explanation: Props are inputs to a component, passed similarly to function arguments, and they are immutable (read‑only).
